nasb.text: So he looked this way and that, and when he saw there was no one around, he struck down the Egyptian and hid him in the sand.

esv.text: He looked this way and that, and seeing no one, he struck down the Egyptian and hid him in the sand.

cnv.text: 摩西左右觀望，見沒有人，就把那埃及人擊殺了，埋藏在沙土裡。

ccb.text: 他左右观望，见四下无人，便下手杀了那埃及人，把尸体埋藏在沙地里。
